# Sprint Planning

Plan a development sprint from approved requirements.

## Instructions

1. List approved requirements by priority: `aida list --status approved`
2. Group by feature area: `aida list`
3. Help user select sprint scope
4. Create sprint container: `aida add --type sprint --title "Sprint N: theme"`
5. Link selected requirements as children
6. Update statuses to in-progress
